name: filter
label: Filter (encoded query)
description: Optional encoded query to scope the rows, e.g. 'active=true'.

name: regionField
label: Region field
description: Field identifying the region, e.g. 'location.state', 'u_state', or 'country'. Its value becomes the join id.

name: metric
label: Metric
description: Aggregation per region: count | sum | avg | min | max. Default 'count'.

name: valueField
label: Value field
description: Numeric field to aggregate (required when metric is not 'count').

name: idType
label: Join id source
description: value (use the region field's RAW value as the join id — best when it matches the atlas feature ids, e.g. 2-letter state codes) | display (use the display value as the id).

name: includeName
label: Include region name
description: Also emit each region's display name (handy for tooltips and name-based joins).
